title: apium ternatum
intro: Apium ternatum, also known as wild celery or marsh penny, is a perennial herb belonging to the parsley family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties due to its essential oils and flavonoids. Consuming Apium ternatum may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
